name: Botasaurus (Anti-Detection Web Scraping Framework)

auth.notes: Local scraper; site auth handled programmatically

performance.notes: Playwright-based with randomized delays; slower than bare requests

agent_readiness.notes: Anti-bot-detection web scraping framework. from botasaurus.browser import browser, Driver. @browser def scrape(driver: Driver, data): driver.get('https://example.com'); return driver.bs4().select_one('h1').text. results = scrape(['https://site1.com', 'https://site2.com']). Built-in: stealth mode (undetected-chromedriver), random delays, user agent rotation, proxy support. @request for simple HTTP scraping. Caching: results cached between runs (@browser(cache=True)). Parallel: @browser(max_drivers=5). Data output to JSON/CSV: output='data.json'. run.py: standard entry point. Beehive: multi-server orchestration (botasaurus cloud). Anti-detection: WebRTC leak prevention, canvas fingerprint randomization, timezone spoofing. BeautifulSoup4 integration. Storage in botasaurus/output/.

gotchas: Anti-detection features do not guarantee success against all sites
ToS violations possible — ensure scraping is authorized
Newer library — less battle-tested than Scrapy
Caching stores results in local files — not production database ready
best_when: Scraping JavaScript-heavy sites with bot detection
Quick scraping tasks needing stealth browser automation
avoid_when: Without explicit site scraping authorization (ToS violation risk)
Large-scale production scraping (Scrapy is more mature)
summary: Botasaurus is an anti-detection web scraping framework. @browser def scrape(driver, data): driver.get(url); return driver.bs4().select('...'). Stealth mode, random delays, user agent rotation, proxy support. Caching, parallel drivers. MIT by omkarcloud. No type annotations. Authorized scraping only — verify ToS. Playwright-based. Newer than Scrapy. Best for JS-heavy sites with bot detection where explicit scraping permission exists.
